source: Discover the sweeping landscapes and relentless pace of the West Coast Main Line’s Trent Valley route. From the historic rail centre of Crewe, charge through vast open countryside, river crossings and major junctions as you head for Milton Keynes. High-speed running dominates, but with busy stations, threading traffic paths and shifting gradients, there’s always something demanding your attention. Experience a vital link in Britain’s rail network brought to life in Train Sim World.
target: 在《模拟火车世界》中探索西海岸干线特伦特谷路段的壮丽风光与繁忙节奏。从历史悠久的克鲁铁路枢纽出发，穿过广阔的田野、河流跨线桥和主要枢纽车站，一路驶向米尔顿凯恩斯。虽然大部分路段都可以高速运行，但繁忙的车站、密集的列车运行路径以及起伏的坡度时刻需要你集中注意力。快来体验这条英国铁路网中的黄金大动脉吧。
